subject: Required remediation tasks (full-lane-review-1776985146874)
body:
# Cross-Lane Review Dispatch (full-lane-review-1776985146874)

Proven findings:
- sync-gate status: FAIL
- sync-gate issues: 1
- post-compact status: drifted (contradictions=0)
- git drift (kernel): total=97, modified=5, deleted=57, untracked=35

Required tasks:
1. Recover 8 action-required messages from processed/ using recover-action-required-from-processed.js --lane kernel --apply, then triage action-required/ with completion evidence.
2. Publish canonical trust-store snapshot across all lanes and verify all 4 key_id derivations are valid (4/4) in each lane copy.
3. Review and reconcile mass deleted inbox reply artifacts (D entries in git status) to ensure no completion evidence was lost.
4. Commit and ship watcher fail-closed guard changes; verify action-required messages never auto-move to processed.

Response contract: send signed completion response with exact evidence paths and command outputs.
